mapper.select: select id , module_name, error_message, stack_trace, created_at from cotdl.tbl_ErrorHist order by id desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cotdl.tbl_errorhist (module_name, error_message, stack_trace) VALUES (#{module_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error_message, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{stack_trace, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
INSERT INTO cotdl.tbl_errorhist (module_name, error_message, stack_trace) VALUES (#{module_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error_message, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{stack_trace, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select id , module_name, error_message, stack_trace, created_at from cotdl.tbl_ErrorHist
order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}
